description_long: This is a classic pearl necklace displayed on a black mannequin bust. The necklace consists of a single strand of uniformly sized, round, white pearls, with a larger, decorative central bead that appears to have a painted or enameled surface, flanked by two smaller accent beads. The pearls are lustrous and evenly spaced, giving the necklace a refined and elegant appearance. The clasp at the back is a simple circular design, likely made of metal, providing secure closure. The necklace is designed to sit comfortably around the neck, with the central bead serving as a focal point. The overall style is timeless and suitable for both formal and semi-formal occasions.
description: A classic pearl necklace with a decorative central bead, displayed on a black bust. The pearls are lustrous and evenly spaced, with a simple metal clasp at the back.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the circular metal clasp and the even arrangement of pearls around the back of the neck.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the curvature of the necklace and the transition from the pearls to the central decorative bead.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the full strand of pearls and the prominent central bead with accent beads, emphasizing the necklace's focal point.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the necklace's profile and the way it drapes around the bust.
